items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: Q: "has this weekend been more confusing than expected?" oscar: "the car's definitely been more…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：腾讯:"这个周末是否比预期的更混乱?" Oscar:"这辆车绝对比预期的更具有挑战性,我们在平衡方面一直挣扎着. 我们相当乐观地认为我们为夸利迈出了良好的一步,
items.summary: Q: "has this weekend been more confusing than expected?" oscar: "the car's definitely been more challenging than expected, we've been struggling a lot with the balance. we were pretty optimistic that we made a good step forward for quali, but it unfortunately didnt change much." https://t.co/TiQtGS2Vy1
items.summary_zh: 腾讯:"这个周末是否比预期的更混乱?" Oscar:"这辆车绝对比预期的更具有挑战性,我们在平衡方面一直挣扎着. 我们相当乐观地认为我们为夸利迈出了良好的一步,

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: Q: "it looked super tough out there. where were you lacking?" oscar: "uhh everywhere 😂 just inc…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：问:"外面看起来非常艰难. Oscar:"啊,到处都是令人难以置信的艰难。 我们以为我们做了一些体面的改进 但是... 我不知道我们是在这种风情下挣扎得更厉害还是发生了什么,但是这真是一团糟".
items.summary: Q: "it looked super tough out there. where were you lacking?" oscar: "uhh everywhere 😂 just incredibly tough. we thought we made some decent improvements but... i dont know if we struggle a lot more in these windy conditions or what happened, but it was a real handful." https://t.co/Mv4SpwOdGh
items.summary_zh: 问:"外面看起来非常艰难. Oscar:"啊,到处都是令人难以置信的艰难。 我们以为我们做了一些体面的改进 但是... 我不知道我们是在这种风情下挣扎得更厉害还是发生了什么,但是这真是一团糟".

items.title: X post from @oscarsspiastree: Q: What is a realistic target? "I think trying to beat the redbulls is probably the main opport…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @oscarsspiastree：问:现实的目标是什么? "我认为试图击败红砖也许是主要的机会. 也许我们可以打败费拉里 但我并不乐观 见其所得. 我的意思是, 最初几圈的短跑 今天上午是混乱的, 所以希望我们可以得到它 并坚持在那里。
items.summary: Q: What is a realistic target? "I think trying to beat the redbulls is probably the main opportunity. Maybe we can beat the ferraris...but I'm not particularly optimistic. We'll see what we get. I mean, the first few laps of the sprint this morning were chaos so hopefully we can get amongst it and hang on from there."
items.summary_zh: 问:现实的目标是什么? "我认为试图击败红砖也许是主要的机会. 也许我们可以打败费拉里 但我并不乐观 见其所得. 我的意思是, 最初几圈的短跑 今天上午是混乱的, 所以希望我们可以得到它 并坚持在那里。

items.title: X post from @oscarsspiastree: Q: On your side of the garage was there some head scratching? "Uh, there was a lot of it. Just…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @oscarsspiastree：问:在你车库的一侧,有没有刮头? "吴,有甚多. 只是用后握力挣扎了很久 我们觉得我们做了一些很明智的修改 以获得资格 但它们并没有真正产生我们期望的影响 我猜 有点惊讶 为什么整个周末都这么棘手 我们整个周末都在和车的平衡进行斗争 通常我们感觉自己缺乏控制力和下力 这个周末开这辆车的人很多 希望我们能看到明天能做什么,
items.summary: Q: On your side of the garage was there some head scratching? "Uh, there was a lot of it. Just struggled a lot with rear grip. We thought we made some pretty sensible changes into qualifying but they just didn't really have the impact we were hoping for I guess. A bit of a surprise as to why it's been so tricky the whole weekend. We've been battling with the balance of the car the whole weekend which normally we feel like lack grip and downforce. This weekend it's been a pretty big handful to drive the car. Hopefully we can see what we can do tomorrow and make it a little bit nicer."
items.summary_zh: 问:在你车库的一侧,有没有刮头? "吴,有甚多. 只是用后握力挣扎了很久 我们觉得我们做了一些很明智的修改 以获得资格 但它们并没有真正产生我们期望的影响 我猜 有点惊讶 为什么整个周末都这么棘手 我们整个周末都在和车的平衡进行斗争 通常我们感觉自己缺乏控制力和下力 这个周末开这辆车的人很多 希望我们能看到明天能做什么,

items.title: X repost from @laurogeitabat: Q: Can I ask what you positively found from the start? "I mean our starts all year have been st…
items.title_zh: X 转帖 @laurogeitabat：问:我能问一下你从一开始就发现了什么? "我的意思是,我们的开始 全年都是强劲的。 所以,我认为,对于我们来说,这是 - 我很惊讶它是如此的好, 但我认为这绝对是积极的。 我们还需要改进一下其他的一切, 希望我们能在今天下午做到这一点。”
items.summary: Q: Can I ask what you positively found from the start? "I mean our starts all year have been strong. So I think for us that's- I was surprised it was so good but I think that's definitely the positive. Everything else we need to improve a little bit and hopefully we can do that for this afternoon."
items.summary_zh: 问:我能问一下你从一开始就发现了什么? "我的意思是,我们的开始 全年都是强劲的。 所以,我认为,对于我们来说,这是 - 我很惊讶它是如此的好, 但我认为这绝对是积极的。 我们还需要改进一下其他的一切, 希望我们能在今天下午做到这一点。”

items.title: X repost from @laurogeitabat: Q: Bit hard to follow that race! "Yeah, it was pretty chaotic that's for sure! I mean it was ve…
items.title_zh: X 转帖 @laurogeitabat：(笑声) 问:跟不上比赛有点困难! "是的,这是相当混乱是肯定的! 我的意思是,这是非常 很难解决 发生了什么事在车上。 试图避免撞到人们的后背 大部分时间如此混乱。 我想有些事情我们肯定能做得更好 但我们也想改进一下车 我们在挣扎 我认为速度看起来还不错, 只是很难把它弄出来。"
items.summary: Q: Bit hard to follow that race! "Yeah, it was pretty chaotic that's for sure! I mean it was very hard to work out what was going on in the car. Trying to avoid crashing into the back of people most of the time so pretty chaotic. I think a few things there's a few things we can do better for sure but we also want to improve the car a bit. We're struggling a little bit. I think the pace looked okay then, just very difficult to get that out of the car."
items.summary_zh: (笑声) 问:跟不上比赛有点困难! "是的,这是相当混乱是肯定的! 我的意思是,这是非常 很难解决 发生了什么事在车上。 试图避免撞到人们的后背 大部分时间如此混乱。 我想有些事情我们肯定能做得更好 但我们也想改进一下车 我们在挣扎 我认为速度看起来还不错, 只是很难把它弄出来。"

items.summary: Q: Did the car feel better from practice to SQ? "Yeah...it improved a bit definitely but not as much as we need unfortunately. I felt like I've really been on it today and we've just not had the pace so um bit of a shame. We'll try again tomorrow!" https://t.co/Tdy7ozSqty

items.title: X post from @oscarsspiastree: Q: Is that kind of where you thought you'd end up? "Yeah, more or less. I think after practice…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @oscarsspiastree：问:你以为会这样吗? "对,或多或少. 我觉得练习后我们看起来很慢 这是关于我们想到的地方。 我认为,说实话, 可能更接近 下一个契约背后的基米和刘易斯如此是。 老实说,今天很困难 但我们明天会努力改进"
items.summary: Q: Is that kind of where you thought you'd end up? "Yeah, more or less. I think after practice we looked pretty...slow. It's about where we thought we'd be. I think, to be honest, probably closer to that next pact behind Kimi and Lewis so yeah. A tricky day to be honest but we'll try and improve for tomorrow."
items.summary_zh: 问:你以为会这样吗? "对,或多或少. 我觉得练习后我们看起来很慢 这是关于我们想到的地方。 我认为,说实话, 可能更接近 下一个契约背后的基米和刘易斯如此是。 老实说,今天很困难 但我们明天会努力改进"

items.title: X post from @oscarsspiastree: Q: What are your expectations? "Um, difficult to know. I think everyone's a little bit up and d…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @oscarsspiastree：问:你有什么期望? "U,难知. 我想除了Mercedes之外 现在每个人都有点上下下 它们在最前线是一种不断的挑战。 奥地利对我们来说有点难以理解。 在比赛中我们觉得会更强大 也许我们觉得会更糟糕 我们以为星期天Ferrari会比他们强得多 Redbul或Max至少比我们想象的要快很多 现在从赛道到赛道都变了很多 每个人的升级 读起来很困难 但我认为我们应该在前面的某个地方 我不知道具体在哪 但我们还是错过了最后一步 真正挑战胜利。 只要我们把最好的脚向前,我想我们是在竞选希望的讲台,但我们必须知道!"
items.summary: Q: What are your expectations? "Um, difficult to know. I think everyone's a little bit up and down at the moment apart from Mercedes. They're kind of a constant challenge at the very front. Austria was a little bit hard to read for us. Qualifying we thought we'd be a bit stronger, in the race maybe we thought we'd be a bit worse. Ferrari we thought would be quite a lot stronger on Sunday than they were. Redbull or Max at least, was a lot quicker than we thought he'd be. It's changing a lot at the moment from track to track with upgrades for everybody. Difficult to read but I think we should be somewhere at the front, where exactly, I don't know. But we're still missing that final step to really challenge for wins. As long as we put our best foot forward, I think we're in the running for hopefully podiums, but we'll have to find out!"
items.summary_zh: 问:你有什么期望? "U,难知. 我想除了Mercedes之外 现在每个人都有点上下下 它们在最前线是一种不断的挑战。 奥地利对我们来说有点难以理解。 在比赛中我们觉得会更强大 也许我们觉得会更糟糕 我们以为星期天Ferrari会比他们强得多 Redbul或Max至少比我们想象的要快很多 现在从赛道到赛道都变了很多 每个人的升级 读起来很困难 但我认为我们应该在前面的某个地方 我不知道具体在哪 但我们还是错过了最后一步 真正挑战胜利。 只要我们把最好的脚向前,我想我们是在竞选希望的讲台,但我们必须知道!"

items.title: X post from @oscarsspiastree: Oscar was asked about the max rumours and what it means for him: "it doesn't really mean much t…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @oscarsspiastree：Oscar被问及最大谣言,以及这对他意味着什么:"这对我意义不大. 马克思显然不需要多谈论他的才华. 我有一个合同。 我多次得到保证,球队对我非常满意,我对球队也非常满意. 对我来说,我很高兴我在哪里, 很高兴我的处境, 并只是想继续我们在过去的几年里的成功。"
items.summary: Oscar was asked about the max rumours and what it means for him: "it doesn't really mean much to me. Max obviously doesn't need to be spoken about much in terms of his talent. I've got a contract in place. I've had multiple reassurances that the team are very happy with me and I'm very happy with the team. For me I'm very happy where I am, happy with the situation I'm in and just trying to continue the success we've had in the last few years."
items.summary_zh: Oscar被问及最大谣言,以及这对他意味着什么:"这对我意义不大. 马克思显然不需要多谈论他的才华. 我有一个合同。 我多次得到保证,球队对我非常满意,我对球队也非常满意. 对我来说,我很高兴我在哪里, 很高兴我的处境, 并只是想继续我们在过去的几年里的成功。"
